message:
fix(cmd): replace hardcoded isKnownAgent switch with config.IsKnownPreset (gt-7r3c)

The isKnownAgent() function had a hardcoded switch statement listing agent
names. This was fragile and fell out of sync with the agent registry (missing
copilot, omp). Now delegates to config.IsKnownPreset() which queries the
canonical agent registry.

Updated tests to iterate over ListAgentPresets() instead of hardcoding names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
